rationale_overall: At cap=5 the watchlist already runs one clean ticker per named wave (NVDA/AI, URA/nuclear, RKLB/rockets, LNG/geopolitical-energy, BOTZ/robotics) and Q2-2024 produced confirming, not reversing, evidence for each: NVDA printed Q1-FY25 revenue of $26B (+262% YoY) with a 10-for-1 split on May 22; Biden signed the Russian uranium import ban on May 13 tightening the URA thesis; RKLB completed its 50th Electron launch and continued Neutron build-out; Cheniere (LNG) kept Sabine Pass/Corpus Christi running at capacity through the Biden LNG-permit pause since its terminals were already approved; and Tesla's June 13 shareholder vote reaffirming Musk's pay package re-anchored the Optimus humanoid story that BOTZ rides. No fundamental thesis breach on any holding and no Q2-24 candidate is compelling enough to force a pairwise swap at this cap, so the disciplined call is no changes this quarter.
